name: dig
description: Drive a dig knowledge base from Codex — search (FTS + semantic/hybrid), organize to a policy, reconcile drift, and remember across sessions, locally and reversibly.

interface.shortDescription: Local, reversible KB: search, organize, recall across sessions
defaultPrompt: Use dig to search my knowledge base.
Use dig to organize these files to my policy.
Use dig to recall what we decided last session.
